obstacle_groups.label: Top-left arm — y=3, x=0..5, touches left edge
Top-right arm — y=3, x=9..14, touches right edge
Bottom-left arm — y=17, x=0..5, touches left edge

Top-left corner anchor — touches top and left edges
Top-right corner anchor — touches top and right edges
Bottom-left corner anchor — touches bottom and left edges

splitters.note: Laser going RIGHT hits this → splits UP+DOWN at (7,10). Clear corridor at x=7 (y=0..9 and y=11..19) for both split beams.
